title: Create Analyzer Lite
description: Client-only HUD for Create mod metrics (RPM, stress, nodes) with in-game configuration
body:
![Banner](https://github.com/d1ts05/CreateAnalyzerLite/blob/main/src/main/resources/banner.png?raw=true)


# Create Analyzer Lite

Client-only HUD overlay for Create mod metrics.

## Features
- Real-time RPM, stress, and node count
- Compact/Expanded display modes
- Theme system (Light/Dark/Auto)
- In-game configuration

## Installation
1. Download from Modrinth
2. Place `.jar` in `mods/` folder
3. Launch with NeoForge 21.1+

## Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.1
- NeoForge 21.1.62+
- Create 6.0+ (optional)

## Configuration
Access via: `Mods → CreateAnalyzerLite → Config`

## Keybinds
- `O` - Toggle overlay
- `Shift+O` - Cycle display mode
